commands:
if %actor.is_pc%
  emote breathes a cloud of smoke.
  'It is to your credit that you have gotten here.
  emote breathes a stream of fire!
  'But you will not defeat me!
  emote roars so loud that you hear ringing!
  'Your death and destruction awaits!
end
name: King Dragon

commands:
emote rears back in surprise.
emote roars 'INTRUDERS!!!'
name: Guard Trigger
